mapper.select: SELECT id, file_id, file_name, file_path, url, biz_type, file_size, content_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_file_t WHERE file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status = 1

SELECT id, file_id, file_name, file_path, url, biz_type, file_size, content_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_file_t WHERE status = 1 AND file_id IN
#{fid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_file_t (id, file_id, file_name, file_path, url, biz_type, file_size, content_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{url}, #{bizType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{lastUpdateBy}, #{lastUpdateTime})
